Interface Rule

All Superinterfaces:
Named
All Known Subinterfaces:
BuiltInRule, ExternalSolverRule, Rule
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule, AbstractBlockContractRule, AbstractLoopContractRule, AbstractLoopInvariantRule, AbstractSideProofRule, AntecTaclet, BlockContractExternalRule, BlockContractInternalRule, CloseAfterMerge, FindTaclet, InfFlowBlockContractInternalRule, InfFlowContractAppTaclet, InfFlowLoopContractInternalRule, InfFlowUseOperationContractRule, InfFlowWhileInvariantRule, IsabelleRule, JmlAssertRule, LoopApplyHeadRule, LoopContractExternalRule, LoopContractInternalRule, LoopScopeInvariantRule, MergeRule, ModalitySideProofRule, NoFindTaclet, ObserverToUpdateRule, OneStepSimplifier, QueryExpand, QuerySideProofRule, RewriteTaclet, SetStatementRule, SMTRule, SuccTaclet, Taclet, Taclet, UseDependencyContractRule, UseOperationContractRule, WdBlockContractInternalRule, WdWhileInvariantRule, WhileInvariantRule
public interface Rule extends Named
The interface to be implemented by all types of rules of the system. It provides access to the rule application logic.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default String
    displayName()
    returns the display name of the rule by default the name is the same as the rules unique name

    Returns the rule executor for this rule.

    name

  • Method Details

    • ruleSets

      default Iterator<RuleSet> ruleSets()

    • getExecutor

      <G extends ProofGoal<G>> RuleExecutor<G> getExecutor()
      Returns the rule executor for this rule. The rule executor encapsulates the logic for rule applications.
      Type Parameters:
      G - kind of goal on which the executor operates
      Returns:
      the rule executor for this rule

    • displayName

      default String displayName()
      returns the display name of the rule by default the name is the same as the rules unique name
